race.comment: XARPO (3) narrowly on top. She's a very consistent mare who has followed a fresh win with two close up minor placings, sticking on well in tougher company last week. She turns around quickly here, draws for a soft run on speed and will take plenty of beating. Very wary of the filly GOLD COAST BELLE (13) who has never finished outside the quinella, dominant at Sandown Lakeside last time. She gets Zahra on with 56kg, if he can find a back to follow she'll go close. BUTTERNUT PRINCESS (2) has been plying her trade in Group company and going okay. They've been a bit messy but form around Treasurethe Moment is hard to ignore. That said, there isn't much between benchmark company and those mares races. FLOWERDALE (12) had genuine excuses last time when dropping right out as favourite. Her form prior has her in the mix. TERRESTAR (1) was solid fresh in Sydney at huge odds, she can figure.
